member.name: T:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources
member.summary: 一个强类型的资源类，用于查找本地化的字符串等。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: 返回此类使用的缓存的 ResourceManager 实例。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: 重写当前线程的 CurrentUICulture 属性，对 使用此强类型资源类的所有资源查找执行重写。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.bmpFind
member.summary: 查找 System.Drawing.Bitmap 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.bmpFinda
member.summary: 查找 System.Drawing.Bitmap 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.bmpLocationFind
member.summary: 查找 System.Drawing.Bitmap 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.curFindTarget
member.summary: 查找 System.Byte[] 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.curLocationFindTarget
member.summary: 查找 System.Byte[] 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Properties.Resources.WindowFinder
member.summary: 查找 System.Drawing.Bitmap 类型的本地化资源。

member.name: T:WindowFinder.Win32
member.summary: Win32 API.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.GetWindowText(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Gets the text of the specified window.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.GetClassName(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Gets the class name of the specified window.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.WindowFromPoint(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the window from the client point.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.HighlightWindow(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Highlights the specified window.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.Win32.HighlightBrush
member.summary: Gets the brush that iwll be used for highlighting

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.CreateHighlightBrushBrush
member.summary: Create brush which will be used for drawing frames

member.name: M:WindowFinder.Win32.CreateRectangleRegion(System.Drawing.Rectangle,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a border region for the given rectangle area

member.name: T:WindowFinder.LocationFinder
member.summary: 取鼠标位置控件

member.name: M:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.MouseChangePos
member.summary: 鼠标坐标发生更改

member.name: P:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.MousePos
member.summary: 当前鼠标在屏幕上的位置

member.name: M:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.WindowFinder_Load(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the Load event of the WindowFinder control.
member.param: The instance containing the event data.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.picTarget_MouseDown(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the MouseDown event of the picTarget control.
member.param: The instance containing the event data.

member.summary: Handles the MouseMove event of the picTarget control.
member.param: The instance containing the event data.

member.summary: Handles the MouseUp event of the picTarget control.
member.param: The instance containing the event data.

member.name: M:WindowFinder.LocationFinder.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Called when the WindowHandle property is changed.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.WindowFinder.WindowHandle
member.summary: Handle of the window found.

member.summary: Handle text of the window found.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.WindowFinder.WindowClass
member.summary: Class of the window found.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.WindowFinder.WindowText
member.summary: Text of the window found.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.WindowFinder.IsWindowUnicode
member.summary: Whether or not the found window is unicode.

member.name: P:WindowFinder.WindowFinder.WindowCharset
member.summary: Whether or not the found window is unicode, via text.

member.summary: 窗口所在的进程ID

member.summary: Sets the window handle if handle is a valid window.
